description_long: This is a small, rounded ceramic teapot with a greenish glaze and a textured, slightly ribbed surface. The body is decorated with repeating white oval motifs, each containing a cluster of dark brown dots, giving it a hand-painted, organic appearance. The spout is short and stout, emerging from the body at a gentle upward angle, while the handle is thick, arched, and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The lid is domed with a small knob on top, fitting snugly into the opening. The overall finish is semi-glossy, with subtle variations in color and texture that suggest artisanal craftsmanship. This teapot would be suitable for serving tea in a cozy, homey setting or as a decorative piece.
description: A small, green ceramic teapot with white and brown decorative motifs, featuring a domed lid, short spout, and thick arched handle.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen at an angle highlighting the spout and lid, with the handle partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: This view shows the teapot's spout and handle clearly, with the decorative motifs and domed lid in full view.
description_view_2: The handle is most prominent here, with the spout mostly hidden and the lid and motifs visible.
description_view_3: The handle is fully visible on the left, with the spout extending to the right and the decorative motifs wrapping around the body.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, slightly curved spout angled gently upward, positioned at the front side of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: Thick, arched loop handle attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, with a rounded ergonomic form.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a small central knob, fits snugly into the opening.
attribute_decorative_patterns: White oval motifs with brown dot clusters, evenly spaced around the green body.
